comment_text.sn26.9:1.6: The inclusion of the space and consciousness elements distinguish this from SN 14.36.

root_text.sn26.9:1.2: “Yo kho, bhikkhave, pathavīdhātuyā uppādo ṭhiti abhinibbatti pātubhāvo …pe… jarāmaraṇassa pātubhāvo;
root_text.sn26.9:1.7: yo viññāṇadhātuyā uppādo ṭhiti abhinibbatti pātubhāvo, dukkhasseso uppādo, rogānaṁ ṭhiti, jarāmaraṇassa pātubhāvo.
root_text.sn26.9:1.8: Yo ca kho, bhikkhave, pathavīdhātuyā nirodho …pe… jarāmaraṇassa atthaṅgamo;
root_text.sn26.9:1.13: yo viññāṇadhātuyā nirodho vūpasamo atthaṅgamo, dukkhasseso nirodho, rogānaṁ vūpasamo, jarāmaraṇassa atthaṅgamo”ti.

translation_text.sn26.9:1.2: “Mendicants, the arising, continuation, and manifestation and regeneration of the earth element,
translation_text.sn26.9:1.7: and the consciousness element is the arising of suffering, the continuation of diseases, and the manifestation of old age and death.
translation_text.sn26.9:1.8: The cessation of the earth element,
translation_text.sn26.9:1.13: and the consciousness element is the cessation of suffering, the settling of diseases, and the disappearance of old age and death.”
